title: Fix VS Code chat panel bugs (notifications, state persistence, types)
description: 1 MEDIUM-HIGH + 4 MEDIUM VS Code bugs.\n\n(V1) Notification sound never plays when chat panel hidden — the primary use case is broken. (V2) ChatMessage type missing decisionId. (V3) pinCache/decisionMap not persisted in setState. (V4) Worker status colors missing READING_CONTEXT/AWAITING_APPROVAL, includes phantom REVIEWING. (V5) Event listener leak on webview re-creation.
definitionOfDone: V1: Notification sound uses vscode.window API instead of webview Audio when panel is hidden
V2: ChatMessage interface in moe.ts includes decisionId?: string
V3: pinCache and decisionMap included in saveState/restoreState
V4: statusColors includes READING_CONTEXT and AWAITING_APPROVAL, removes REVIEWING
V5: webview event listeners pushed to disposables array

implementationPlan.description: V1: Fix notification sound for hidden webview. In `ChatViewProvider.ts`, move notification sound logic from webview to extension host. Instead of posting `playSound` to webview, use VS Code's `vscode.env.appHost` and play sound via a different mechanism. For the notification itself, `vscode.window.showInformationMessage` already works without webview. Remove the webview `playSound` message type and the `BEEP_WAV` constant from webview script. The sound notification is secondary to the visual notification which already works via `showInformationMessage`. Error handling: catch errors in notification path silently.
implementationPlan.note: Removed webview-based audio (BEEP_WAV, playNotificationSound, playSound handler, media-src CSP). Visual notification via vscode.window.showInformationMessage works regardless of panel visibility. Sound via webview was unreliable when panel hidden.

implementationPlan.description: V2: Add `decisionId` to ChatMessage type. In `moe-vscode/src/types/moe.ts`, add `decisionId?: string` to the `ChatMessage` interface (after `timestamp` field, ~line 101). This ensures TypeScript type checking covers decision-linked messages. Error handling: optional field, backward-compatible.
implementationPlan.note: Already fixed in task-9cfb063f reopened fix. decisionId?: string present at line 102 of moe.ts.

implementationPlan.description: V3: Persist `pinCache` and `decisionMap` in webview state. In `ChatViewProvider.ts` webview script, update `saveState()` to include `pinCache` and `decisionMap`: `vscode.setState({ currentChannel, unreadCounts, messageCache, pinCache, decisionMap })`. Update state restoration at top to include: `let pinCache = prevState.pinCache || {}; let decisionMap = prevState.decisionMap || {};`. Error handling: defaults to empty objects if not in saved state.
implementationPlan.note: pinCache and decisionMap now restored from prevState on init and included in saveState(). Defaults to empty objects if not in saved state.

implementationPlan.description: V4: Fix worker status dot colors. In `ChatViewProvider.ts` webview script, update `statusColors` map (~line 877): replace `{ IDLE: '#888', CODING: '#22c55e', PLANNING: '#a855f7', BLOCKED: '#ef4444', REVIEWING: '#f59e0b' }` with `{ IDLE: '#888', CODING: '#22c55e', PLANNING: '#a855f7', BLOCKED: '#ef4444', READING_CONTEXT: '#3b82f6', AWAITING_APPROVAL: '#f59e0b' }`. Remove phantom `REVIEWING` state, add `READING_CONTEXT` (blue) and `AWAITING_APPROVAL` (amber). Error handling: unknown status still falls back to gray.
implementationPlan.note: Replaced phantom REVIEWING with READING_CONTEXT (blue #3b82f6) and AWAITING_APPROVAL (amber #f59e0b). Unknown statuses still fall back to IDLE gray.

implementationPlan.description: V5: Fix event listener leak on webview re-creation. In `resolveWebviewView()`, push the disposables from `webviewView.onDidDispose()` and `webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility()` to `this.disposables` array: `this.disposables.push(webviewView.onDidDispose(...))` and `this.disposables.push(webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(...))`. Error handling: disposables properly cleaned up on extension deactivation.
implementationPlan.note: Pushed onDidDispose, onDidChangeVisibility, and onDidReceiveMessage disposables to this.disposables array. All cleaned up on extension deactivation via dispose().

implementationPlan.description: Test: Run `cd moe-vscode && npm run compile` to verify compilation. Manual test: verify notifications work when panel hidden, verify status dots show correct colors for all worker states, verify decision cards survive panel hide/show.
implementationPlan.note: VS Code tsc --noEmit clean, daemon 293/293 tests pass.
